/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wshadow -Wno-unused-parameter -fopenmp -mavx2 -O3 -DNDEBUG -O3 -march=native -ffast-math -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/src/tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/src/activations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/src/dense.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/src/loss.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/src/model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/src/optimizer.cpp.o -o unit_tests  _deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2Main.a -lpthread /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/14/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a _deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2.a
